---
title: "Publications"
---

## 2026

**ARe you watching the road? Comparing Gaze Behaviour and Hazard Prediction between Heads-Up and Heads-Down NDRT Presentation in Augmented Reality**\
Goodge, T., Pollick, F., & Brewster, S.\
*ACM Transactions on Applied Perception*\
[![DOI](https://img.shields.io/badge/DOI-10.1145%2F-blue?style=flat)](https://doi.org/10.1145/3807942) [![PDF](https://img.shields.io/badge/PDF-Download-red?style=flat&logo=adobeacrobatreader&logoColor=white)](https://doi.org/10.1145/3807942)

------------------------------------------------------------------------

**Towards Responsible Memory Augmentation: Surveying the Intended Uses of Everyday Augmented Reality and Artificial Intelligence for Memory Processes**\
Wilson, G., Goodge, T., O'Hagan, J., & McGill, M.\
*CHI 2026*\
[![DOI](https://img.shields.io/badge/DOI-10.1145%2F-blue?style=flat)](https://doi.org/10.1145/3795011.3795018) [![PDF](https://img.shields.io/badge/PDF-Download-red?style=flat&logo=adobeacrobatreader&logoColor=white)](#)

------------------------------------------------------------------------

**Running into Traffic: Investigating External Human-Machine Interfaces for Automated Vehicle-Runner Interaction**\
Al-Taie, A., Goodge, T., Macdonald, S., & Brewster, S.\
*CHI 2026*\
[![DOI](https://img.shields.io/badge/DOI-10.1145%2F-blue?style=flat)](https://doi.org/10.1145/3772318.3790401) [![PDF](https://img.shields.io/badge/PDF-Download-red?style=flat&logo=adobeacrobatreader&logoColor=white)](#)

------------------------------------------------------------------------

**An investigation into driver's perceptions of road flooding and adherence to signage**\
Watkins, M., Bathaei Javareshk, M., Goodge, T., & Crundall, D.\
*Transportation Research Part F: Traffic Psychology and Behaviour*\
[![DOI](https://img.shields.io/badge/DOI-10.1016%2F-blue?style=flat)](https://doi.org/10.1016/j.trf.2026.103639) [![PDF](https://img.shields.io/badge/PDF-Download-red?style=flat&logo=adobeacrobatreader&logoColor=white)](#)

------------------------------------------------------------------------

## 2025

**Do We Need Responsible XR? Drawing on Responsible AI to Inform Ethical Research and Practice into XRAI / the Metaverse**\
McGill, M., O'Hagan, J., Goodge, T., & Gugenheimer, J.\
*CHI 2025 Workshop: Everyday AR through AI-in-the-Loop* · Position Paper\
[![PDF](https://img.shields.io/badge/PDF-Download-red?style=flat&logo=adobeacrobatreader&logoColor=white)](https://www.researchgate.net/publication/390570438)

------------------------------------------------------------------------

**Investigating the effects of augmented reality cues during non-driving related tasks on the situational awareness of drivers**\
Goodge, T.,\
*University of Glasgow Enlighten Repository* · PhD Thesis\
[![PDF](https://img.shields.io/badge/PDF-Download-red?style=flat&logo=adobeacrobatreader&logoColor=white)](https://https://theses.gla.ac.uk/84942/)

------------------------------------------------------------------------

## 2024

**Can You Hazard a Guess?: Evaluating the Effect of Augmented Reality Cues on Driver Hazard Prediction**\
Goodge, T., Pollick, F., & Brewster, S.\
*CHI 2024*\
[![DOI](https://img.shields.io/badge/DOI-10.1145%2F-blue?style=flat)](https://doi.org/10.1145/3613904.3642300) [![PDF](https://img.shields.io/badge/PDF-Download-red?style=flat&logo=adobeacrobatreader&logoColor=white)](https://www.researchgate.net/publication/379839876)

------------------------------------------------------------------------

**Where's my TOR?: Evaluating the Effect of Take-Over Request Source on Older Drivers' Control Transition in Level 3 Cars**\
Srour Zreik, R., Goodge, T., Harvey, M., & Brewster, S.\
*Proceedings of the ACM on Human-Computer Interaction (CSCW 2024)*\
[![DOI](https://img.shields.io/badge/DOI-10.1145%2F-blue?style=flat)](https://doi.org/#) [![PDF](https://img.shields.io/badge/PDF-Download-red?style=flat&logo=adobeacrobatreader&logoColor=white)](https://www.researchgate.net/publication/384300864)

------------------------------------------------------------------------

**Bike to the Future: Designing Holistic Autonomous Vehicle-Cyclist Interfaces**\
Al-Taie, A., Wilson, G., Goodge, T., Pollick, F., & Brewster, S.\
*AutomotiveUI 2024*\
[![DOI](https://img.shields.io/badge/DOI-10.1145%2F-blue?style=flat)](https://doi.org/#) [![PDF](https://img.shields.io/badge/PDF-Download-red?style=flat&logo=adobeacrobatreader&logoColor=white)](#)

------------------------------------------------------------------------

**Beyond Aesthetics: Evaluating Response Widgets for Reliability & Construct Validity of Scale Questionnaires**\
Farzand, H., Al Baiaty Suarez, D., Goodge, T., & Al Awadi, A.\
*CHI 2024*\
[![DOI](https://img.shields.io/badge/DOI-10.1145%2F-blue?style=flat)](https://doi.org/#) [![PDF](https://img.shields.io/badge/PDF-Download-red?style=flat&logo=adobeacrobatreader&logoColor=white)](#)

------------------------------------------------------------------------

## 2023

**Enhancing Explainability of Automated Vehicles with Culturally-Aware HMIs**\
Goodge, T., Li, J., Patel, S., & Kim, S.\
*AutomotiveUI 2023*\
[![DOI](https://img.shields.io/badge/DOI-10.1145%2F-blue?style=flat)](https://doi.org/#) [![PDF](https://img.shields.io/badge/PDF-Download-red?style=flat&logo=adobeacrobatreader&logoColor=white)](#)

------------------------------------------------------------------------

**Cyborgs on the Road: Workshop on Augmenting Road Users to Quantify their Behaviour**\
Al-Taie, A., Pöhlmann, K., Goodge, T., & Brewster, S.\
*CHI 2023 Workshop*\
[![PDF](https://img.shields.io/badge/PDF-Download-red?style=flat&logo=adobeacrobatreader&logoColor=white)](https://www.researchgate.net/publication/369245977)

------------------------------------------------------------------------

## 2021

**A comparison of cybersickness symptoms across 360-degree hazard perception and hazard prediction tests for drivers**\
Goodge, T., Kroll, V., Vernon, M., & Crundall, D.\
*Applied Ergonomics*\
[![DOI](https://img.shields.io/badge/DOI-10.1016%2F-blue?style=flat)](https://doi.org/#) [![PDF](https://img.shields.io/badge/PDF-Download-red?style=flat&logo=adobeacrobatreader&logoColor=white)](#)

------------------------------------------------------------------------

## 2020

**Creating a hazard-based training and assessment tool for emergency response drivers**\
Kroll, V., Mackenzie, A. K., Goodge, T., & Crundall, D.\
*Accident Analysis & Prevention*\
[![DOI](https://img.shields.io/badge/DOI-10.1016%2F-blue?style=flat)](https://doi.org/#) [![PDF](https://img.shields.io/badge/PDF-Download-red?style=flat&logo=adobeacrobatreader&logoColor=white)](#)
